---
name: Workshop request / host offer
about: Request a workshop or offer to host one
title: "[workshop] "

---

**Are you requesting a workshop, or offering to host one?**

**Audience**
<!-- Who are the learners? Roughly how many? What's their background? -->

**Track(s) / topics of interest**
<!-- Foundations, Robotics & Autonomy, AI & World Models, Cloud, Blockchain, Capstone… -->

**Format**
- [ ] In person  (location: ______)
- [ ] Online
- [ ] Hybrid

**Preferred dates / timeframe**

**Logistics (for hosts)**
- Venue / Wi-Fi / power / room for helpers to circulate?
- Can you provide a collaborative-notes doc and registration?
- Any institutional support or funding?

**Anything else we should know?**

> Reminder: every ForgeLab workshop needs ≥2 certified instructors + helpers. If you're
> offering to host, we'll help line up the teaching team.
